name: Spike Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from steak.
2. Crack peppercorns coarsely and press garlic cloves into both sides of the steak.
3. Let the seasoned steak stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
4. Make a thick paste by combining salt and water.
5. Cover the top side of the peppered steak with half the paste mixture, using a wet cloth or paper towel to hold the salt in place.
6. Place the covered steak on the grill (if grilling), ensuring the salt side is down. If broiling, place the salt side up, 3 inches from the heat source.
7. Cover the top of the steak with the remaining paste mixture and another wet cloth or paper towel.
8. Cook for 15 minutes per side for rare, or 25 minutes per side for medium-rare.
9. Remove the salt before serving.
